text.title: Agent Eval Cost Budget Policy Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether agent-eval-cost-budget-policy applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is eval spend ≥$50/month AND ≥1 PR/day touches the agent?

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
